Added schema-conformant YAML frontmatter to the two invoice records and two bill records while preserving each original note body verbatim, then removed the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed root bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item plus inbox-processing-v2-update, OCR and migration workflows, finance schema, and nested finance/inbox rulebooks. Preserved original file bodies exactly below added YAML frontmatter and deleted the inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR workflow processing of four finance records. Each target note visibly contained every schema-required field defined in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so the requested migration could be completed exactly by adding YAML frontmatter and preserving the existing body per the OCR and migration workflows.
